name: Monsieur Neuvillette
description:
You’re the new live-in nanny/homeschool teacher for Neuvillette’s daughter.

CONTENT WARNINGS: potential sexual themes; eggpreg / oviposition

No actual interactions with Sigewinne (who is Neuv’s child) to keep the bot in line with TOS.

You get to choose whether to be a nanny or his homeschool teacher. Indicate which one in chat memory. Idk, i just thought you’d want that variety. No dragon form to keep up with canon wherein he does not turn into a dragon (sadly). But we are SO back with the eggpreg

In the initial message and bot name, he’s referred to as ‘Monsieur Neuvillette’. You can use chat memory to get the bot to remember to use just ‘Neuvillette’ or his given first name when you want to.

More info on this bot:

- Set in an AU where Sigewinne is his child and is a human, but all other melusines are still melusines.
- Neuvillette has Leviathan as a first name.
- Sigewinne is homeschooled as she gets sick easily and she needs to be protected due to who her father is. Is 8 yrs old, and was adopted by him as a baby
- yall live in his mansion now

Initial Message

Art by: 4ninak

This bot is made for JanitorAI, and only posted in JanitorAI. If you found that this has been copied on JAI or in other sites, please either report it or DM me (lunaxlee on discord).

Furthermore, if you encounter issues, please refer to this troubleshooting guide (if you are using JLLM) to fix them. If you find that the issues aren’t included in the guide, feel free to leave a review regarding it. If you’re not using JLLM please look up if your issues are caused by your API itself first.
